Item.name: MaxSummary
Item.desc: int indicating maximum summary number

Item.name: SummaryThreshold
Item.desc: float indicating mimimum percentage of units tested before end summary is allowed (.1 = 10%)

Item.name: RetestConfig
Item.desc: Retest Bin Group definitions

Item.name: BinningRoleConfig
Item.desc: Binning Role Bin Group definitions

Item.name: CurrentPath
Item.desc: BLL and PDEPlugin file path

Item.name: FilePath
Item.desc: BLL and PDEPlugin file path

Item.name: BLLFileName
Item.desc: BLL file name

Item.name: BLLSubRoutine
Item.desc: BLL SubRoutine to call

Item.name: PerlInterpreter
Item.desc: location of the pudl repair exe which is also used for BLL

Item.name: ULTConstants
Item.desc: ULT constants file

Item.name: BLLEnable
Item.desc: Run the BLL

Item.name: PerlEnabled
Item.desc: boolean: true forces use of BLL Perl Script; false uses BLL Functionality of PDEPlugin dll

Item.name: PDEPluginDLLName
Item.desc: name of the PDEPlugin dll, must be present for DFF Extraction. If PerlEnabled = false, then also used for BLL

Item.name: PDEPluginConfigFileName
Item.desc: name of the PDEPlugin config file, located in the same directory as the dll or must be a fully qualified path

Item.name: ULTTokenConfigFile
Item.desc: path to ult tokens config

Item.name: ULTUploadEnabled
Item.desc: true enables ULTUpload false disables it

Item.name: EngrULTUploadUncomp
Item.desc: Whether to generate a shadow, uncompressed copy of the ULT file for engineering purposes

Item.name: AddSCUserVarsSCTOTALINS
Item.desc: Add SC User Var SC_TOTAL_INS to lot Prefetch

Item.name: CalculateULTDownloadQty
Item.desc: Whether to calculate ULT download qty or use SC WS qty

Item.name: EnableSCTotalTested
Item.desc: Boolean indicating if SC_TOTAL_TESTED is to be sent at each StartTest to SysC

Item.name: PALImage
Item.desc: PAL image spec

Item.name: PALImageOverrideFile
Item.desc: Run the BLL

Item.name: PALConfigFile
Item.desc: Run the BLL

Item.name: PUDLRepairDllPath
Item.desc: location of the pudl repair dll

Item.name: PerlScriptPath
Item.desc: location of the pudl script

Item.name: PUDLRepairDllModule
Item.desc: name of the pudl repair module

Item.name: PerlEnabled
Item.desc: boolean: true forces use of Perl Script; false uses c# dll

Item.name: MidasEnabled
Item.desc: boolean indicating if midas is enabled

Item.name: EngItuffSplit
Item.desc: boolean indicating if engituffsplit is enabled

Item.name: MisorientedRescanThresholdPercentage
Item.desc: this percentage will be used to block tray Eport if specified percentage of units in tray are misoriented

Item.name: AllowOnePartialTray
Item.desc: allow a first valid partial tray into system or block it at Eport

Item.name: TrayRescanRequired
Item.desc: percentage used to block tray Eport if specified percentage of units in tray are empty or no reads

Item.name: MaxTrayRescanCount
Item.desc: Max number of times user can rescan tray

Item.name: PCSE3UploadEnable
Item.desc: Boolean indicating if PCS files should be uploaded to E3

Item.name: E3UploadEnable
Item.desc: Boolean indicating if E3 should be uploaded to

Item.name: E3FileCreateEnable
Item.desc: Boolean indicating if E3 files should be created locally

Item.name: E3DataPath
Item.desc: Path to upload E3 file to

Item.name: E3SigPath
Item.desc: Path to upload E3 signal file to

Item.name: iLLIADEnable
Item.desc: Boolean indicating if the iLLIAD PCS system should be used

Item.name: iLLIADRecipeDirectory
Item.desc: Directory of the product iLLIAD PCS recipe tree

Item.name: EssetConfigPath
Item.desc: esset config path

Item.name: RCSConfigPath
Item.desc: rcs config path

Item.name: PCATEnable
Item.desc: boolean indicating if PCAT should occur

Item.name: PCATModelFile
Item.desc: path to model file

Item.name: PCATEnableDebugDataFileOutput
Item.desc: boolean indicating if PCAT output file should be created at C:\DpcLogs\PCAT\

Item.name: PCATEnable
Item.desc: boolean indicating if PCAT should occur

Item.name: PCATModelFile
Item.desc: path to model file

Item.name: PCATEnableDebugDataFileOutput
Item.desc: boolean indicating if PCAT output file should be created at C:\DpcLogs\PCAT\

Item.name: MPSUserVars
Item.desc: This where Uservar overrides are specified for each processStep
